# seerr_notification_discord (Data Source)

Read Seerr discord notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/discord.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `discord` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--discord))
- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `notification_types` (Set of String)
- `types` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--discord"></a>
### Nested Schema for `discord`

Read-Only:

- `bot_avatar_url` (String)
- `bot_username` (String)
- `enable_mentions` (Boolean)
- `webhook_url` (String)
